h1.visual_description: Not explicitly shown in snippet, but implied as a major section header (e.g., 'Appendix B') based on subsection numbering.

h2.visual_description: Bold, serif font, prefixed with a section letter and decimal number (e.g., B.3). Left-aligned with a small vertical margin above.

visual_matchers.pattern: Blue colored text within parentheses, typically (Author et al., Year)
Bolded phrases at the beginning of sentences within a paragraph
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Definition or introduction of a key technical term (e.g., **Guideline contamination**)

markdown_grammar.math_environment: LaTeX style ($...$ for inline, $$...$$ for block)
markdown_grammar.citation_format: Parenthetical (Author et al., Year) with blue text styling

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Standard academic paper margins; no visible running headers or page numbers in this specific crop.
